items.title: SEC Establishes Joint Data Standards as Required Under the Financial Data Transparency Act of 2022
items.raw_excerpt: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission established joint data standards under the Financial Data Transparency Act of 2022. The final rule establishes technical standards for data submitted to certain financial regulatory agencies. Eight additional…
